M1000_DC_LTCH_14_DA M1000 Discharged Past 14 Days From LTCH This field indicates the patient was discharged from long-term care hospital during the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M1000_DC_OTH_14_DA M1000 Discharged Past 14 Days From Other This field indicates the patient was discharged from somewhere other than listed above during the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
